stemHtml: The ILS receiver of an aircraft flying down the exact runway centreline will receive:

options.a: no modulated signal because the left and the right lobes cancel each other along the centerline.
options.b: 90 Hz and 150 Hz lobes at equal depth.
options.c: the same frequency modulated signal from both lobes with the maximum of magnitude.
options.d: the maximum magnitude of the difference between the 90 Hz and 150 Hz amplitudes.
